title: Live results: Cotton expected to keep Arkansas Senate seat, with primary underway
author: The Hill Staff
fullText: Arkansas Sen. Tom Cotton (R) is competing in a Tuesday GOP primary, which he is almost certainly going to win. Cotton is the favorite to win in November, too. Democratic challengers include Hallie Shoffner, a farmer, and Ethan Dunbar. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here. “” “”
summary: Arkansas Sen. Tom Cotton (R) is competing in a Tuesday GOP primary, which he is almost certainly going to win. Cotton is the favorite to win in November, too. Democratic challengers include Hallie Shoffner, a farmer, and Ethan Dunbar. Follow Decision Desk HQ’s live results here. “” “”
